text: get aim context should return (almost) all parent aims - path to root.
description: when creating that path: beware of cycles. And maybe a max of 12 parents. When parents branch, follow those with the highest absolute/actual value inflow

reflections.context: get_aim_context only returned immediate parents; aim wanted the full lineage to the root goal.
reflections.outcome: Added path_to_root: loads the graph once, reuses calculateAimValues' flowValues to pick the highest value-inflow parent at each branch, cycle-guarded, capped at 12, ordered root-first. Verified live on single-hop, multi-hop, and 4-parent-branch cases.
reflections.effectiveness: Reusing the existing value model gave principled branch selection for free and replaced N per-parent round-trips with one graph load.
reflections.lesson: When a tool needs graph-wide reasoning, load the whole aim list once and reuse calculateAimValues rather than fetching node-by-node.

status.comment: Implemented value-guided path_to_root in get_aim_context (cycle-guarded, max 12, follows highest value-inflow parent at branches). Committed on branch mcp-aim-context-path-to-root.
